product: Inbound Private Link for performance-intensive services is now generally…
tagline: Inbound Private Link for performance intensive services, such as Lakebase Autoscaling and Zerobus Ingest, is now generally available.
what_it_does: Inbound Private Link for performance intensive services, such as Lakebase Autoscaling and Zerobus Ingest, is now generally available. This page shows how to configure PrivateLink for inbound connectivity to performance intensive services on the Databricks platform. This private connection allows external clients and users to access services on the Databricks platform, such as Zerobus Ingest and Lakebase Autoscaling.
why_it_matters: Inbound Private Link for performance intensive services, such as Lakebase Autoscaling and Zerobus Ingest, is now generally available.
key_takeaway: Inbound Private Link for performance intensive services, such as Lakebase Autoscaling and Zerobus Ingest, is now generally available.
